films.title: The King of Pigs
films.overview: Two friends, Jung Jong-suk and Hwang Kyung-min, meet after several years and talk about their time in school, which left them scarred.

films.title: JUNG_E
films.overview: On an uninhabitable 22nd-century Earth, the outcome of a civil war hinges on cloning the brain of an elite soldier to create a robot mercenary.

films.title: Revelations
films.overview: A pastor who believes in divine revelation and a detective haunted by visions pursue a missing person case — exposing their own demons in the process.

films.title: Seoul Station
films.overview: In this animated prequel to "Train to Busan," a group of survivors deals with a zombie pandemic that unleashes itself in downtown Seoul.

films.title: Train to Busan
films.overview: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival.

films.title: Psychokinesis
films.overview: An ordinary guy suddenly finds he has superpowers he can use to help his spirited daughter and the people around them, but he also runs into trouble in the process.

films.title: Peninsula
films.overview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.
